theme: Modern Premium Minimalist & Obsidian Luxury Accent
comment: Transitioning CozaStore from old-school rigid grid borders to modern, premium, borderless layout hierarchies with high-contrast luxury accent tokens.

borders.premium_overhaul: None (Replace legacy borders with generous vertical layout padding: 60px to 80px increments)

border_radii.premium_overhaul: 8px for product card containers, 24px for pills/capsules/buttons, 12px for modal cards

micro_interactions.buttons: transform: translateY(-2px) scale(1.02) with cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.8, 0.25, 1) transition
micro_interactions.product_cards: transform: translateY(-6px) with dynamic drop-shadow expansion
micro_interactions.nav_links: after::width transition (0% to 100%) for horizontal underline anchors
